question: Can an equal-vote 60/90/180-day positive BTC spot momentum ensemble reduce parameter dependence and preserve nonnegative confirmation returns while keeping the complete rule-level holdout profitable?
development_gate: base/stress >0; max drawdown >-30% and >=15pp better than BTC 0.5x; turnover <=20
evaluation_gate: base/stress >0; max drawdown >-20% and no more than 2pp worse than BTC 0.5x; all single windows >0
confirmation_gate: base/stress >=0; max drawdown >-18% and no more than 3pp worse than BTC 0.5x; all single windows >=0; evaluation+confirmation compounded >0
holdout_release_rule: reuse exposed development/evaluation only after checkpoint and gates; download confirmation only after both pass
